title: Diamond Passing Pattern Drills (w/technical footwork)
summary: 4-pole diamond passing work for variable group size to work on receiving and turning moves (e.g. V-Turn)
pitchSize: 25 by 25 yd area (poles/mannequins better than cones for this one)
setupHtml: 4 pole diamond (12-15 yds apart); Divide players evenly in lines behind each pole, 5 yds away from the pole
instructionsHtml:
1. Pass to next teammate and follow pass (back of line on next pole)
  2. Add # of balls and technical moves when receiving through progressions
progressionsHtml:
1. increase number of balls (up to three)
  2. techniques to change direction: 2a) first touch back towards passer, then drag-back V turn 2b) first touch towards passer, drag back, then 2 Cruyff turns
emphasisHtml: Create receiving space - Check into the defender than check out to receive Body Shape and back foot receiving Technical skills to change direction
